safety_note: This manifest stores planned tiny CoilSnake project edits, expected text-match counts, and promotion targets only; generated projects and rebuilt ROMs stay under ignored build/coilsnake.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed the first unique map door Destination Y field from 1210 to 1211.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Determine whether neighboring map_doors.yml destination fields are contiguous in CoilSnake's rebuilt CF door payload and map the rebuilt layout back to local D0/CF door runtime records.

planned_experiments.edit_description: Changed the first placed map sprite NPC ID from 1254 to 1255.
planned_experiments.promotion_target: Join CoilSnake map_sprites.yml placement vocabulary to local sprite placement pointer/table ranges and NPC config references.

planned_experiments.promotion_target: Pair with the existing window width probe to identify adjacent window configuration fields and decide whether C3:E250..E3F8 needs a finer local window/config split.
